

---
title: "8_stage_meta_and_step_pct"
output: html_document
params:
  # ---- curve selector ----
  curve: "q025"   # one of: "q50", "q16", "q025"

  # ---- inputs ----
  init_path: "Spatial/global_orchestrator_init.rds"
  rank_path: "Spatial/rankmap.tif"

  # ---- outputs (all under Spatial/Outputs_<curve>/ana/) ----
  ana_subdir: "ana"
  stage_meta_name: "stage_meta.csv"      # stage end: alive_end, removed_end, pct_removed_end
  step_pct_name: "step_pct.tif"          # per-cell: cumulative proportion removed at the step it is removed (kept cells = 1)
  step_stage_name: "step_stage.tif"      # per-cell: stage number when cell removed (kept cells = last stage)
  fp_name: "fp.rds"

  # ---- rankmap outputs ----
  rank_alive_dir: "rank_alive"           # ana/rank_alive/
  rank_alive_prefix: "alive_stage_"      # alive_stage_0001.tif, etc.

  # ---- run controls ----
  build_step_masks: true                 # requires removed_mask_*.tif in Spatial/Outputs_<curve>/
  build_rank_alive: true                 # uses stage_meta + rankmap.tif
  overwrite: true

  # ---- performance ----
  chunk_nrows: 256

  # ---- rankmap checks ----
  allow_rank_values_read: true           # required to build rank_alive masks
  check_rank_unique: true                # exact uniqueness check (requires reading all non-NA values)
---

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 00_checks — ALL setup + preconditions + helpers
# After this chunk, the rest of the script is "do the work".
# ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(terra)
  library(data.table)
})

# -------------------------
# tiny helpers
# -------------------------
assert <- function(ok, msg) if (!isTRUE(ok)) stop(msg, call. = FALSE)
need_file <- function(p, label = p) assert(file.exists(p), paste0("Missing file: ", label, "\nPath: ", p))
need_dir  <- function(p, label = p) assert(dir.exists(p),  paste0("Missing dir: ",  label, "\nPath: ", p))

# Stage tag for filenames
stagetag <- function(x) sprintf("%04d", as.integer(x))

# Nth-largest cutoff using partial sort (base R)
nth_largest <- function(x, n) {
  x <- as.numeric(x)
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  k <- length(x) - as.integer(n) + 1L
  sort(x, partial = k)[k]
}

# Parse removed-mask filenames into a stable step order
index_removed_masks <- function(out_curve) {
  ff <- list.files(out_curve, pattern = "^removed_mask_.*\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)
  ff <- ff[file.exists(ff)]
  if (!length(ff)) return(data.table())

  dt <- data.table(path = ff, base = basename(ff))
  dt[, `:=`(type = NA_character_, stage = NA_integer_, iter = 0L)]

  # pruning
  i <- grepl("^removed_mask_pruning_stage_[0-9]{4}_iter_[0-9]{3}\\.tif$", dt$base)
  dt[i, `:=`(
    type  = "prune",
    stage = as.integer(sub("^removed_mask_pruning_stage_([0-9]{4})_iter_[0-9]{3}\\.tif$", "\\1", base)),
    iter  = as.integer(sub("^removed_mask_pruning_stage_[0-9]{4}_iter_([0-9]{3})\\.tif$", "\\1", base))
  )]

  # fragmentation
  i <- grepl("^removed_mask_fragmentation_stage_[0-9]{4}.*\\.tif$", dt$base)
  dt[i, `:=`(
    type  = "frag",
    stage = as.integer(sub("^removed_mask_fragmentation_stage_([0-9]{4}).*\\.tif$", "\\1", base)),
    iter  = 0L
  )]

  # distance
  i <- grepl("^removed_mask_distance_stage_[0-9]{4}\\.tif$", dt$base)
  dt[i, `:=`(
    type  = "dist",
    stage = as.integer(sub("^removed_mask_distance_stage_([0-9]{4})\\.tif$", "\\1", base)),
    iter  = 0L
  )]

  # anything else (kept last)
  dt[is.na(type),  type  := "other"]
  dt[is.na(stage), stage := 999999L]
  dt[is.na(iter),  iter  := 0L]

  # stable ordering: stage, type rank, iter
  type_rank <- c(prune = 1L, frag = 2L, dist = 3L, other = 99L)
  dt[, type_rank := type_rank[type]]
  setorder(dt, stage, type_rank, iter, base)
  dt[, step := .I]
  dt[]
}

# -------------------------
# params
# -------------------------
curve <- as.character(params$curve)
assert(curve %in% c("q50", "q16", "q025"),
       "params$curve must be one of: 'q50', 'q16', 'q025'.")

do_step   <- isTRUE(params$build_step_masks)
do_rank   <- isTRUE(params$build_rank_alive)
overwrite <- isTRUE(params$overwrite)

chunk_nrows <- as.integer(params$chunk_nrows)
assert(chunk_nrows > 0L, "params$chunk_nrows must be > 0.")

# -------------------------
# paths (contract: all analysis outputs under Spatial/Outputs_<curve>/ana/)
# -------------------------
init_path <- as.character(params$init_path)
need_file(init_path, "Spatial/global_orchestrator_init.rds")

out_curve <- file.path("Spatial", paste0("Outputs_", curve))
need_dir(out_curve, paste0("Spatial/Outputs_", curve))

ana <- file.path(out_curve, as.character(params$ana_subdir))
dir.create(ana, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
need_dir(ana, "ana")

# outputs
stage_meta_csv <- file.path(ana, as.character(params$stage_meta_name))
step_pct_tif   <- file.path(ana, as.character(params$step_pct_name))
step_stage_tif <- file.path(ana, as.character(params$step_stage_name))
fp_rds         <- file.path(ana, as.character(params$fp_name))

rank_alive_dir <- file.path(ana, as.character(params$rank_alive_dir))
if (do_rank) {
  dir.create(rank_alive_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  need_dir(rank_alive_dir, "ana/rank_alive")
}

# -------------------------
# init: template + alive0 domain
# -------------------------
init <- readRDS(init_path)
assert(!is.null(init$patch_stack_file) && file.exists(init$patch_stack_file),
       "init$patch_stack_file missing or does not exist.")
assert(!is.null(init$count_alive),
       "init$count_alive missing in global_orchestrator_init.rds")

template <- terra::rast(init$patch_stack_file)[[1]]
alive0 <- as.integer(init$count_alive) > 0L
assert(length(alive0) == terra::ncell(template), "init$count_alive length != ncell(template).")

alive0_n <- sum(alive0)
assert(is.finite(alive0_n) && alive0_n > 0, "alive0_n is zero (no alive cells in init).")

rm(init); gc(FALSE)

# -------------------------
# pipeline stage checkpoints (for stage_meta + final_alive)
# -------------------------
gs_files <- list.files(out_curve, pattern = "^global_state_stage_[0-9]{4}\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)
gs_files <- gs_files[file.exists(gs_files)]
assert(length(gs_files) > 0L, paste0("No global_state_stage_####.rds found in: ", out_curve))

st <- data.table(path = gs_files, base = basename(gs_files))
st[, stage := suppressWarnings(as.integer(sub("^global_state_stage_([0-9]{4})\\.rds$", "\\1", base)))]
st <- st[is.finite(stage)]                # drop anything that didn't parse cleanly
setorder(st, stage)
assert(nrow(st) > 0L, "Found global_state files but could not parse any stage numbers.")

# final_alive from the LAST stage checkpoint (used only to validate step masks)
last_gs_path <- st$path[nrow(st)]         # <-- FIX: no `.N` outside DT[]
assert(is.character(last_gs_path) && length(last_gs_path) == 1L && nzchar(last_gs_path),
       "Internal error: last_gs_path is not a single valid file path.")

gs_last <- readRDS(last_gs_path)
assert(!is.null(gs_last$count_alive) && length(gs_last$count_alive) == terra::ncell(template),
       "Latest global_state is missing a valid count_alive vector.")
final_alive <- as.integer(gs_last$count_alive) > 0L
rm(gs_last); gc(FALSE)

# -------------------------
# removed masks index (needed for step_pct / step_stage)
# -------------------------
mask_idx <- data.table()
if (do_step) {
  mask_idx <- index_removed_masks(out_curve)
  assert(nrow(mask_idx) > 0L, paste0("build_step_masks=TRUE but no removed_mask_*.tif found in: ", out_curve))
}

# -------------------------
# rankmap checks (domain + geometry + optional uniqueness)
# -------------------------
rank <- NULL
rank_vals_nonNA <- NULL

if (do_rank) {
  rank_path <- as.character(params$rank_path)
  need_file(rank_path, "rankmap.tif")

  rank <- terra::rast(rank_path)
  assert(terra::compareGeom(template, rank, stopOnError = FALSE),
         "rankmap.tif geometry does not match pipeline template grid.")

  # Domain must match alive0 domain size
  n_rank_nonNA <- as.numeric(terra::global(terra::ifel(!is.na(rank), 1, 0), "sum", na.rm = TRUE)[1, 1])
  assert(n_rank_nonNA == alive0_n,
         paste0("rankmap domain mismatch:\n",
                "  nonNA(rankmap) = ", n_rank_nonNA, "\n",
                "  alive0_n        = ", alive0_n))

  assert(isTRUE(params$allow_rank_values_read),
         "To build rank_alive masks, set params$allow_rank_values_read = true.")

  if (isTRUE(params$check_rank_unique)) {
    v <- terra::values(rank, mat = FALSE)
    v <- v[!is.na(v)]
    assert(anyDuplicated(v) == 0L,
           "rankmap uniqueness check failed: duplicated non-NA values detected.")
    rank_vals_nonNA <- v
    rm(v); gc(FALSE)
  }
}

cat("\n=== Script 8 (refactor) ===\n")
cat("curve        :", curve, "\n")
cat("out_curve    :", out_curve, "\n")
cat("ana          :", ana, "\n")
cat("alive0_n     :", alive0_n, "\n")
cat("n_stages     :", nrow(st), "\n")
cat("build_step   :", do_step, "\n")
cat("build_rank   :", do_rank, "\n")
cat("overwrite    :", overwrite, "\n\n")
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 01_stage_meta — stage_meta.csv from pipeline checkpoints
#
# stage_meta.csv columns:
#   stage, alive_end, removed_end, pct_removed_end
# ============================================================

if (file.exists(stage_meta_csv) && !overwrite) {
  cat("[stage_meta] Exists -> loading: ", stage_meta_csv, "\n", sep = "")
  stage_meta <- fread(stage_meta_csv)
} else {
  cat("[stage_meta] Building from global_state_stage_####.rds ...\n")

  stage_meta <- rbindlist(lapply(seq_len(nrow(st)), function(i) {
    gs <- readRDS(st$path[i])
    ca <- as.integer(gs$count_alive)
    # We validated count_alive presence/length in 00_checks for the last file;
    # here we assume all checkpoint files follow the same schema.
    data.table(
      stage = as.integer(st$stage[i]),
      alive_end = as.numeric(sum(ca > 0L, na.rm = TRUE))
    )
  }), use.names = TRUE)

  stage_meta[, removed_end := as.numeric(alive0_n) - alive_end]
  stage_meta[, pct_removed_end := 100 * (removed_end / as.numeric(alive0_n))]

  fwrite(stage_meta, stage_meta_csv)
  cat("[stage_meta] Wrote: ", stage_meta_csv, "\n", sep = "")
}

print(stage_meta)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 02_step_pct_and_step_stage — per-cell removal “order” rasters
#
# Produces the SAME *content* as the old Script 8 removal order mask:
#   - step_pct.tif: cumulative proportion removed at the step the cell is removed
#                  (kept cells = 1; NA-domain preserved)
#   - step_stage.tif: stage number associated with that removal step
#
# Requires removed_mask_*.tif in Spatial/Outputs_<curve>/
# ============================================================

if (!do_step) {
  cat("[step_masks] build_step_masks=FALSE -> skipping step_pct/step_stage.\n")
} else if (file.exists(step_pct_tif) && file.exists(step_stage_tif) && !overwrite) {
  cat("[step_masks] Exists -> skipping (overwrite=FALSE):\n")
  cat("  - ", step_pct_tif, "\n", sep = "")
  cat("  - ", step_stage_tif, "\n", sep = "")
} else {

  cat("[step_masks] Building step rasters by scanning removed_mask_*.tif ...\n")

  # Load the removed masks stack (ordered)
  ms <- terra::rast(mask_idx$path)
  names(ms) <- sprintf("%04d_%s_%03d", mask_idx$stage, mask_idx$type, mask_idx$iter)

  L <- terra::nlyr(ms)
  kept_step <- L + 1L

  # Per-step removed counts among alive0 cells (for cum prop)
  step_removed <- numeric(L)

  # Diagnostics (computed, then validated at end)
  n_overlap <- 0L
  n_extra   <- 0L
  n_missing <- 0L
  n_final_removed <- 0L
  n_removed_alive0 <- 0L

  nrows_tot <- terra::nrow(template)
  ncols     <- terra::ncol(template)

  # Temp file holds "first removal step" per cell (INT2S/INT4S)
  tmp_step <- file.path(tempdir(), sprintf("tmp_step_%s.tif", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")))
  step_dtype <- if (kept_step <= 32767L) "INT2S" else "INT4S"

  terra::readStart(ms)
  on.exit(try(terra::readStop(ms), silent = TRUE), add = TRUE)

  step_r <- terra::rast(template)
  terra::writeStart(step_r, filename = tmp_step, overwrite = TRUE, datatype = step_dtype,
                    gdal = c("COMPRESS=DEFLATE", "PREDICTOR=2", "ZLEVEL=6", "TILED=YES", "BIGTIFF=YES"))

  # --- place these BEFORE the while-loop ---
  L <- terra::nlyr(ms)
  kept_step <- L + 1L
  
  # Heuristic: if full block matrix would be huge, process masks in smaller layer batches
  max_mat_elems <- 2e7            # ~20 million elements cap (tune if needed)
  layer_batch   <- 10L            # number of layers to read at once (tune: 5–20)
  
  row <- 1L
  while (row <= nrows_tot) {
    print(row)
  
    nrows <- min(chunk_nrows, nrows_tot - row + 1L)
    ncell_block <- nrows * ncols
  
    start_cell <- (row - 1L) * ncols + 1L
    end_cell   <- start_cell + ncell_block - 1L
  
    alive_blk <- alive0[start_cell:end_cell]
    final_blk <- final_alive[start_cell:end_cell]
  
    # Decide whether we can safely read ALL layers at once for this block
    can_read_all <- (ncell_block * L) <= max_mat_elems
  
    if (can_read_all) {
      # ---- fast path (small enough) ----
      v <- terra::readValues(ms, row = row, nrows = nrows, mat = TRUE)
      pres <- !is.na(v) & (v != 0)
      rm(v)
  
      cnt <- rowSums(pres)
      removed_blk <- cnt > 0L
      first_idx <- max.col(pres, ties.method = "first")
      first_step_blk <- ifelse(removed_blk, first_idx, NA_integer_)
  
      if (any(alive_blk)) {
        step_removed <- step_removed + as.numeric(colSums(pres[alive_blk, , drop = FALSE]))
      }
  
      rm(pres)
  
    } else {
      # ---- memory-safe path (batch layers) ----
      cnt <- integer(ncell_block)
      first_step_blk <- rep.int(NA_integer_, ncell_block)
  
      if (any(alive_blk)) idx_alive <- which(alive_blk) else idx_alive <- integer(0)
  
      for (l0 in seq.int(1L, L, by = layer_batch)) {
        l1 <- min(L, l0 + layer_batch - 1L)
  
        vv <- terra::readValues(ms[[l0:l1]], row = row, nrows = nrows, mat = TRUE)
        pres <- !is.na(vv) & (vv != 0)
        rm(vv)
  
        if (!any(pres)) {
          rm(pres)
          next
        }
  
        row_cnt <- rowSums(pres)
        cnt <- cnt + row_cnt
  
        need_first <- is.na(first_step_blk) & (row_cnt > 0L)
        if (any(need_first)) {
          idx <- max.col(pres, ties.method = "first")
          first_step_blk[need_first] <- (l0 - 1L) + idx[need_first]
        }
  
        if (length(idx_alive)) {
          step_removed[l0:l1] <- step_removed[l0:l1] + as.numeric(colSums(pres[idx_alive, , drop = FALSE]))
        }
  
        rm(pres)
      }
  
      removed_blk <- cnt > 0L
    }
  
    # ---- diagnostics (same as your current code) ----
    n_overlap <- n_overlap + sum(cnt > 1L)
    n_extra   <- n_extra   + sum(!alive_blk & removed_blk)
    n_removed_alive0 <- n_removed_alive0 + sum(alive_blk & removed_blk)
    n_missing <- n_missing + sum(alive_blk & !final_blk & !removed_blk)
    n_final_removed <- n_final_removed + sum(final_blk & removed_blk)
  
    # ---- write step raster values (same semantics) ----
    step_vals <- first_step_blk
    step_vals[cnt > 1L] <- NA_integer_
    step_vals[alive_blk & final_blk & !removed_blk] <- kept_step
    step_vals[final_blk & removed_blk] <- NA_integer_
  
    terra::writeValues(step_r, step_vals, start = row, nrows = nrows)
  
    row <- row + nrows
  
    # optional: keep memory steady on long runs
    if ((row %% (chunk_nrows * 10L)) == 1L) gc(FALSE)
  }
  terra::writeStop(step_r)

  # ---- hard invariants (enforced here, but logic is “one place” in this chunk) ----
  assert(n_overlap == 0L, "FAIL: removed masks overlap (some cells appear in >1 removed_mask).")
  assert(n_extra   == 0L, "FAIL: removed masks include cells not alive in init.")
  assert(n_final_removed == 0L, "FAIL: some final-alive cells are included in removed masks.")
  assert(n_missing == 0L, "FAIL: some non-final init-alive cells were never removed (and are not final-alive).")
  assert((n_removed_alive0 + sum(final_alive)) == alive0_n,
         "FAIL: partition mismatch: removed_from_alive0 + final_alive != alive0_n.")

  # ---- step -> cumulative proportion removed ----
  step_dt <- copy(mask_idx)[, .(step, stage, type, iter)]
  step_dt[, cells_removed := as.numeric(step_removed)]
  step_dt[, cum_removed := cumsum(cells_removed)]
  step_dt[, cum_prop_removed := cum_removed / as.numeric(alive0_n)]

  # For the "kept" step: cum_prop = 1, stage = last real stage
  last_stage <- max(step_dt$stage[is.finite(step_dt$stage) & step_dt$stage < 999999L], na.rm = TRUE)
  assert(is.finite(last_stage), "FAIL: could not infer last_stage from removed masks.")

  from_prop  <- c(step_dt$step, kept_step)
  to_prop    <- c(step_dt$cum_prop_removed, 1)

  from_stage <- c(step_dt$step, kept_step)
  to_stage   <- c(as.integer(step_dt$stage), as.integer(last_stage))

  # Materialize final rasters from tmp_step
  step_first <- terra::rast(tmp_step)
  step_pct   <- terra::subst(step_first, from = from_prop,  to = to_prop,  others = NA_real_)
  step_stage <- terra::subst(step_first, from = from_stage, to = to_stage, others = NA_integer_)

  # Write outputs (analysis contract: under ana/)
  wopt_pct   <- list(datatype = "FLT4S", gdal = c("COMPRESS=DEFLATE", "PREDICTOR=2", "ZLEVEL=6", "TILED=YES", "BIGTIFF=IF_SAFER"))
  wopt_stage <- list(datatype = "INT2S", gdal = c("COMPRESS=DEFLATE", "PREDICTOR=2", "ZLEVEL=6", "TILED=YES", "BIGTIFF=IF_SAFER"))

  terra::writeRaster(step_pct,   step_pct_tif,   overwrite = TRUE, wopt = wopt_pct)
  terra::writeRaster(step_stage, step_stage_tif, overwrite = TRUE, wopt = wopt_stage)

  cat("[step_masks] Wrote:\n")
  cat("  - ", step_pct_tif, "\n", sep = "")
  cat("  - ", step_stage_tif, "\n", sep = "")

  rm(ms, step_first, step_pct, step_stage); gc(FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 03_rank_alive_masks — rankmap alive masks aligned to stage ends
#
# For each stage s:
#   keep top N = stage_meta$alive_end(s) rankmap cells (largest values),
#   write 1 for kept cells and NA elsewhere.
#
# Output:
#   ana/rank_alive/alive_stage_0001.tif, ...
# ============================================================

if (!do_rank) {
  cat("[rank_alive] build_rank_alive=FALSE -> skipping.\n")
} else {

  # Ensure we have the non-NA values vector to compute cutoffs
  if (is.null(rank_vals_nonNA)) {
    v <- terra::values(rank, mat = FALSE)
    rank_vals_nonNA <- v[!is.na(v)]
    rm(v); gc(FALSE)
  }

  # Write options (binary mask rasters)
  wopt_mask <- list(datatype = "INT1U", gdal = c("COMPRESS=DEFLATE", "TILED=YES", "BIGTIFF=IF_SAFER"))

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(stage_meta))) {
    s <- as.integer(stage_meta$stage[i])
    N <- as.integer(stage_meta$alive_end[i])
    N <- max(0L, min(N, as.integer(alive0_n)))  # clamp

    out <- file.path(rank_alive_dir, paste0(as.character(params$rank_alive_prefix), stagetag(s), ".tif"))
    if (file.exists(out) && !overwrite) next

    if (N == 0L) {
      m <- terra::ifel(!is.na(rank), NA_integer_, NA_integer_)
    } else if (N >= alive0_n) {
      m <- terra::ifel(!is.na(rank), 1L, NA_integer_)
    } else {
      cutoff <- nth_largest(rank_vals_nonNA, N)
      m <- terra::ifel(!is.na(rank) & (rank >= cutoff), 1L, NA_integer_)

      # If you enforced uniqueness, this should be exact.
      if (isTRUE(params$check_rank_unique)) {
        n_keep <- as.numeric(terra::global(terra::ifel(!is.na(m), 1, 0), "sum", na.rm = TRUE)[1, 1])
        assert(n_keep == N, paste0("rank_alive keep-count mismatch at stage ", s, ": expected ", N, " got ", n_keep))
      }
    }

    terra::writeRaster(m, out, overwrite = TRUE, wopt = wopt_mask)
    rm(m); gc(FALSE)
  }

  cat("[rank_alive] Wrote masks to: ", rank_alive_dir, "\n", sep = "")
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 04_fingerprint — tiny provenance record for this analysis step
# ============================================================

fp <- list(
  created_at = Sys.time(),
  curve = curve,
  init_path = init_path,
  out_curve = out_curve,
  ana = ana,
  outputs = list(
    stage_meta_csv = stage_meta_csv,
    step_pct_tif   = if (do_step) step_pct_tif else NA_character_,
    step_stage_tif = if (do_step) step_stage_tif else NA_character_,
    rank_alive_dir = if (do_rank) rank_alive_dir else NA_character_
  ),
  params = as.list(params)
)

saveRDS(fp, fp_rds)
cat("[fp] Wrote: ", fp_rds, "\n", sep = "")
```
